calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Aug-18-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DEBT MANAGEMENT PARTNERS, LLC HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

Defendant Collins' claim of exemption is granted in part. The levying officer is directed to withhold $30 per pay period (weekly) from defendant's earnings.

Court to issue an order and mail copies to levying officer and parties.

Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CEK)
